'''darudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oesteoclast|oesteoclast]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oesteoclast|oesteoclast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| darudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæridhith|dæridhith]] || [[word:dæridhij|dæridhij]] || [[word:dæridhish|dæridhish]] || [[word:dæridhi|dæridhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:darurudhuth|darurudhuth]] || [[word:darurudhuj|darurudhuj]] || [[word:darurudhush|darurudhush]] || [[word:darurudhu|darurudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:darudhuth|darudhuth]] || [[word:darudhuj|darudhuj]] || [[word:darudhush|darudhush]] || [[word:darudhu|darudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:darufdhuth|darufdhuth]] || [[word:darufdhuj|darufdhuj]] || [[word:darufdhush|darufdhush]] || [[word:darufdhuf|darufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:darudhuthu|darudhuthu]] || [[word:darudhuju|darudhuju]] || [[word:darudhushu|darudhushu]] || [[word:darudhuku|darudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:darudhuth|darudhuth]] || [[word:darudhuj|darudhuj]] || [[word:darudhush|darudhush]] || [[word:darudhu|darudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:darudhuthul|darudhuthul]] || [[word:darudhujul|darudhujul]] || [[word:darudhushul|darudhushul]] || [[word:darudhukul|darudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:darudhuthuthu|darudhuthuthu]] || [[word:darudhujuju|darudhujuju]] || [[word:darudhushushu|darudhushushu]] || [[word:darudhuku|darudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:darudhuthun|darudhuthun]] || [[word:darudhujun|darudhujun]] || [[word:darudhushun|darudhushun]] || [[word:darudhukun|darudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:darudhuthuoro|darudhuthuoro]] || [[word:darudhujuoro|darudhujuoro]] || [[word:darudhushuoro|darudhushuoro]] || [[word:darudhukuoro|darudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
